Virginia Pharmacy Tech License

Here's what you need to know.

Last updated 2026-02-25 · Sources verified

Fingerprinting
Required
Board
Virginia Board of Pharmacy

Endorsement through Virginia Board of Pharmacy
See the steps Primary board page (opens in new tab)

Fee and timing details are still being re-checked state by state. Check the board page before you count on a fee or timeline for a start date.

Out-of-State Pharmacy Technicians

There is no active interstate compact route for pharmacy technician licensing in Virginia. Plan on endorsement through Virginia Board of Pharmacy.

Key Timeline Factors

Keep these requirements in mind, as they are the most likely to impact your processing timeline in Virginia.

  • Fingerprinting: Required. Out-of-state applicants can use IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects). Completing prints outside Virginia can add 2-4 weeks.
  • License verification: Virginia requires verification of your current out-of-state license before your file is complete.
  • Compact status: No active compact route here. Plan on endorsement.
  • Temporary license: The board lists a temporary or provisional route while the full file is pending.

Virginia Endorsement Requirements

This is the step-by-step endorsement checklist for already-licensed pharmacy technicians applying to practice in Virginia.

  1. Step 1

    Submit Your Application

    Apply through the Virginia Board of Pharmacy. The application fee is $100.

  2. Step 2

    Provide License Verification

    Virginia requires official verification of your active out-of-state license. This must be sent directly to the board from your current state board or its official online verification system before your file can be considered complete.

  3. Step 3

    Request Official Transcripts

    Sent directly from your educational institution.

  4. Step 4

    Submit Your Exam Score Report

    Official verification of passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

  5. Step 5

    Complete Fingerprinting and Background Screening

    Virginia requires a criminal background check for all applicants. Out-of-state applicants can use IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects). Completing prints outside Virginia can add 2-4 weeks to your processing time.

  6. Step 6

    Complete the Jurisprudence or State Law Requirement

    Virginia requires a jurisprudence exam or state law course as part of this licensing path. Check the board site for approved providers.

  7. Step 7

    Await Board Processing

    Plan for a processing timeline of about 4 to 6 Weeks once your file is complete. If you need to start working immediately, the board offers a temporary or provisional licensing route that you can utilize while your full application is pending.

Temporary License

Virginia offers a temporary or provisional license so you can start working while your full endorsement application is processing.

Virginia Pharmacy Technician Licensing FAQ

How much does a Virginia pharmacy technician license cost?

Verify the current fee and processing timeline on the primary board page linked below. Those details are still being re-checked state by state for this specialty.

Is national certification required?

Yes, passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

Does Virginia have reciprocity for pharmacy technicians?

No interstate compact currently covers pharmacy technician practice in Virginia. To work in Virginia, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

How long does it take to transfer my pharmacy technician license to Virginia?

Verify the current fee and processing timeline on the primary board page linked below. Those details are still being re-checked state by state for this specialty.

Can I start working in Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?

Verify the current fee and processing timeline on the primary board page linked below. Those details are still being re-checked state by state for this specialty.
